headline: SpaceX IPO Valuation Is Worth More Than Boeing, RTX, GE Aerospace And Every Other S&P 500 Aerospace Firm Combined: Report
summary: The upcoming SpaceX IPO is touted to be the biggest public offering since Aramco in 2019. However, the more than $1.7 trillion valuation puts it further ahead than some of the biggest companies on the S&P 500 index, operated by...

headline: Can Boeing's Global Services Business Become a Bigger Growth Driver?
summary: BA's services unit posts higher Q1 revenues, a record $33B backlog and major contract wins, highlighting a growing source of recurring growth.

headline: L3Harris Secures VAMPIRE Order to Strengthen Counter-Drone Defense
summary: LHX lands up to $106M U.S. Army VAMPIRE order, bolstering layered counter-drone defense as demand rises for fast, affordable systems.

headline: Forget AI Software: Why the Smart Money is Betting Billions on Autonomous Weapons
summary: The Pentagon’s FY2027 budget request totals $1.5 trillion, with $54 billion earmarked for autonomous and remotely operated systems and another $39 billion routed through what the Department of War now calls “Drone Dominance. That structural tailwind is the entire pitch behind Global X Defense Tech ETF (NYSEARCA:SHLD), a thematic vehicle that has gathered roughly $7.5 ... Forget AI Software: Why the Smart Money is Betting Billions on Autonomous Weapons
